NXT-64662.summary: SC Insights - Revenue Card - The revenue report and Revenue Card insight values do not match for the prior year.
NXT-64662.desc:
The revenue report and Revenue Card insight values do not match for the prior year.

!image-20250725-142420.png|width=1097,height=346,alt="image-20250725-142420.png"!

!image-20250725-142433.png|width=1324,height=670,alt="image-20250725-142433.png"!

For Prior Year:
As per the revenue report - 39,393.17
As per the revenue card     - 39,389.33 
Difference value                      - *3.84*

The discrepancies in the following schools:
Texas Elementary: 2.55
Texas High School: 0.63
Texas ISD High School: 0.3
Texas ISD Middle School: 0.12
Texas Middle School: 0.24

Sum of the above schools 2.55 + 0.63 + 0.3 + 0.12 +0.24 = *3.84*

Attached the evidence for the same.

[^NXT-64397, NXT-64398.xlsx]

NXT-67454.desc:
As Dallas the Director I want to provide MPLH Insights via the new Insights Workspace site.

*requirements*



* Create rollup tables for MPLH reporting.
** Considerations: 
*** Daily vs monthly reporting. 
*** Labor Categories vs FT/PT Calcs
* Create a lightweight stored proc to send back all MPLH data below.

# Meals per labor hour (MPLH)
## Parameters: Date Range, Sites
## Return: Number of hours (by labor category or by FT/PT hr x serving days calcs), total number of labor hours, number of meals, meal equivalent ratios, meal equivalent conversions, total number of meal equivalents, target meals per labor hour, meals per labor hour. Indicator for if they are using Daily/Monthly recording.
### Per site, per date.

SP will be used by the Platform/Insights team for an API on the Insights Workspace.

!https://dev.azure.com/Cybersoft-Technologies-Inc/0d08063f-212a-4277-87f0-199e49d410e9/_apis/wit/attachments/1e875d5a-f6e0-4d04-90b0-4f0447307221?fileName=image.png|width=250,alt="Image"!

!image-20251105-183231.png|width=1126,alt="image-20251105-183231.png"!

NXT-67455.desc:
As Dallas the Director I want to provide MPLH Insights via the new Insights Workspace site.

*requirements*



* We might need rollup tables for this data if we can't surface them from PersonRollups.
** Considerations:
*** We need to know how many students are Paid (Default) every day for each site.
*** We need to know how total number of students.
* Create a lightweight stored proc to send back Paid Not Applied data.

# Paid not applied (PNA)
## Parameters: Date Range, Sites
## Return: Number of students with Eligibility: Paid (Default), Total number of active students
### per each date, per site

SP will be used by the Platform/Insights team for an API on the Insights Workspace.



!image-20251105-183259.png|width=1126,alt="image-20251105-183259.png"!

NXT-67456.desc:
As Dallas the Director I want to provide Eligible Not Participating Insights via the new Insights Workspace site.

*requirements*



* We might need rollup tables for this data if we can't surface them from PersonRollups.
** Considerations:
*** We need to know how many students are Free/Reduced every day for each site.
*** We need to know how many of those have not had a reimbursible meal for each day+site+mealtype+pricetype.
*** We need to know the total number of students for each day+site. PersonRollups will have this bit.
* Create a lightweight stored proc to send back data for students with benefits, who are not participating by purchasing a reimbursable meal.

# Eligible not participating (ENP)
## Parameters: Date Range, Sites, PriceType/Eligibility, MealTypes
## Return: Number of students by Eligibility (Free, Reduced, Paid) that have not had a Reimbursable Meal, Number of active students at the site
### per date, per site, per meal type, per price type

SP will be used by the Platform/Insights team for an API on the Insights Workspace.

!image-20251105-183316.png|width=1126,alt="image-20251105-183316.png"!

NXT-70919.desc:
In lieu of heavy reporting for central (state/FSMC) users, Insights KPIs will be expanded to support a central level view. These views will display the relevant KPI cards and show the list of districts with pivoted KPI values. A district selector can be used to then filter down one or more districts. Selecting a single district will display the current experience with district-level KPI information.

Relevant KPIs for the central level are … (start with bold items, eligibility top priority, others are secondary, unbold are tertiary)

+*Current:*+

* *Eco Dis - consolidated F&R percentage for all districts (related to eligibility and account management)*
* *Meals - consolidated total of meals served for all districts (related to accountability and account management)*
* MEQs - consolidated total of meal equivalents (MEQs) served for all districts (related to accountability)
* Revenue - consolidated total of revenue for all districts (related to accountability)
* *Breakfast - consolidated % of participation for all districts (related to accountability)*
* *Lunch - consolidated % of participation for all districts (related to accountability)*
* *Snack - consolidated % of participation for all districts (related to accountability)*
* *Supper - consolidated % of participation for all districts (related to accountability)*
* Waste - consolidated waste dollar/% for all districts (related to production)
* Inventory Value - consolidated value dollar for all districts (related to inventory)
* Inventory Turnover - consolidated turnover for all districts (related to inventory)
* Inventory Discrepancy - consolidated discrepancy dollar for all districts (related to inventory)

+*New/enhanced KPIs:*+

* *Eco Dis - Central (and district) should include a further breakdown of eligibility by status AND reason (DC: SNAP, TANF, Medicaid; Application: Income, etc). Details at central should display percentage of DC match rate overall). (related to eligibility and account management)*
* *Reimbursement - consolidated total of reimbursement for all districts (related to accountability)*
* *DC Compliance - consolidated percentage of districts within (and not within) compliance of DC (related to eligibility)*
* Link to data download (excel) for relevant reports (eligibility summary, participation, revenue, activity, etc)
